text:
All in all, development-oriented finance plays initiative function
                                                                                                                    under the guidance of the scientific development concept, adheres to
                                                                                                                    dialectical thinking, innovation, correctly handles the relationship
                                                                                                                    between internal reasons and external reasons, between the govern-
                                                                                                                    ment market and enterprises so as to build an effective macro-policy
                                                                                                                    and market adjustment transmission mechanism and break the credit
                                                                                                                    bottlenecks, provide financial services and promote economic and
                                                                                                                    social sustainable development. The theory and practice of develop-
                                                                                                                    ment-oriented finance is not only good to CDB’s work but also good
                                                                                                                    to other kind of work, not only beneficial to China’s economic devel-
                                                                                                                    opment but also beneficial to the international community, particu-
                                                                                                                    larly to developing countries. The theory and practice of
                                                                                                                    development-oriented finance will continue to deepen and develop,
                                                                                                                    while this study will be carried forward.

b1768_FM.indd xxxix                                                                                                                                                                                         8/27/2014 3:08:19 PM
